SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2015 IS CONTINUED TO APR-06-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-06-2015 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-10-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEBTOR HAS AGREED TO PAY CREDITOR $375 PER MONTH, STARTING APRIL 15, 2015; SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS DUE ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH. FINAL PAYMENT IS DUE ON 9/10/15 IN THE SUM OF $325; WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE LAST PAYMENT, PLAINTIFF IS GOING TO FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WITH THE COURT AND MAIL A COPY TO THE DEBTOR. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 3/19/15 IS WITHDRAWN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
